annotations.label: Measure-theoretic Chebyshev inequality

anchor.snippet: extended real -valued measurable function defined on

annotations.note: Mathlib proves μ{x | ε ≤ f x} ≤ (∫⁻ f)/ε for ℝ≥0∞-valued functions, the measure-theoretic Markov/Chebyshev inequality (the t^{-p}∫|f|^p form is also available as mul_meas_ge_le_pow_eLpNorm').

annotations.note: Mathlib has Markov for a single function but not the g∘f generalization for a nonnegative nondecreasing g as a named result.

anchor.snippet: states that for any non-negative real-valued random variable

annotations.note: Mathlib proves ε·μ.real{x | ε ≤ f x} ≤ ∫ f for nonnegative integrable f, i.e. Markov's inequality (also stated for lintegrals as mul_meas_ge_le_lintegral₀).

annotations.label: Selberg's inequality

anchor.snippet: Selberg derived a generalization to arbitrary intervals

annotations.label: Exponential Chebyshev's inequality

anchor.snippet: sometimes known as the exponential Chebyshev's inequality

annotations.note: Mathlib proves μ.real{ω | ε ≤ X ω} ≤ exp(−tε)·mgf X μ t, the exponential Chebyshev / Chernoff bound.

annotations.note: Cantelli's one-sided inequality P(X−μ≥λ)≤σ²/(σ²+λ²) is not formalized in Mathlib.

anchor.snippet: are two monotonic functions of the same monotonicity
